title: Elder Guardian Trident
description: Changes the trident model to an elder guardian styled trident.
body:
This resource pack has only been tested in 1.21.9 and may not work in other versions. This resource pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to properly work.

[Guardian Variant](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/guardian-trident)

Model and texture made with Blockbench by me. You are allowed to use this resource pack in modpacks (with credits if its outside of Modrinth).
